svg.title: Bridged Wi-Fi Talos worker architecture
svg.desc: Omni on the management NUC asks the provider on the Wi-Fi CachyOS host to create a Talos virtual machine. An ASUS media bridge presents multi-MAC Ethernet over Wi-Fi, so the host and the VM sit directly on the HomeLab VLAN and Cilium exchanges pod routes automatically.
